scripts.check: node --check *.js && node --check *.mjs && node --input-type=module -e "await import('./main.js'); await import('./canonical-main.js'); await import('./stage.js')"
scripts.validate: node validateImagePipelineConfig.js && node validateImagePipelineConfig.js --real-graph && node validateImagePipelineConfig.js --expect-invalid duplicate-scene-render duplicate-scene-pass-graph missing-final-ao-graph duplicate-output-owner double-output-transform missing-velocity-convention undeclared-mrt-consumer depth-in-mrt false-exposure-claim && node validate-image-pipeline-artifacts.mjs
scripts.validate:unit: npm run validate && npm run validate:canonical
scripts.validate:quick: npm run check && npm run validate:canonical
scripts.validate:full: npm run validate:quick && npm run validate && npm run validate:artifacts
